title: Finlaysonia insularum
taxonomy: Finlaysonia insularum is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands of India. The classification of Finlaysonia insularum is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Magnoliales, and family Annonaceae. The genus Finlaysonia is part of the Annonaceae family and is closely related to the genus Uvaria. Finlaysonia insularum is a relatively rare species.
